headline: Permissionless on-chain lending with geo-blocked official frontend

findings.text: The Controller contract (e.g., 0xA920De414eA4Ab66b97dA1bFE9e6EcA7d4219635) allows anyone to borrow using create_loan (0x23cfed03) or create_loan_extended (0xea4ab7fc) without a whitelist.
Admission to the protocol is unconditional; no off-chain operators or keepers are required for a user to enter a loan position.
The Terms of Service explicitly prohibit users from sanctioned jurisdictions (UN, US, EU, SECO list) and reserve the right to technically restrict access.
Active geo-blocking is enforced on the primary curve.finance domain, restricting users based on IP address location.
Alternative access is documented, including direct interaction with contracts via Etherscan and access to source code on GitHub.
No on-chain sanctions enforcement or address-level blacklisting was observed in the verified contract logic for crvUSD.
Read functions and critical write functions (borrow, repay, liquidate) are all permissionless for any user.
Verbatim ToS eligibility clause: 'By accessing or using the Website, you represent and warrant that you... are not subject to personal sanctions issued by the UN, US, EU or Switzerland'.

steelman.red: The primary user interface curve.finance restricts access for users in the United States and other sanctioned jurisdictions through IP-based geo-blocking.
steelman.orange: While the official frontend is restricted, alternative access paths such as Etherscan and community-run UIs exist, though they require higher technical expertise to use safely.
steelman.green: The core protocol smart contracts are entirely permissionless, allowing any user to borrow, repay, and liquidate positions without any on-chain whitelist or address-level gating.

rationale.verdict: Choosing green because the on-chain protocol logic for crvUSD is fully open-access and lacks any address-level restrictions, ensuring the core lending functions remain permissionless despite standard frontend-level compliance measures.

evidence.shows: Controller contract exposing permissionless create_loan and create_loan_extended entry points.
ControllerFactory verified source with no admission whitelist for borrowers.
Terms of Service eligibility clause and sanctions list governing the official frontend.

protocol_metadata.about: crvUSD is a CDP-based stablecoin using the LLAMMA mechanism for soft liquidations. The core lending contracts are permissionless on-chain; the primary curve.finance frontend implements jurisdictional geo-blocking and ToS restrictions, but alternative access paths via Etherscan and self-hosted UIs remain available.
